caption: Two men are seated in a room, positioned in front of a television and a shelf of media cases. The man on the left wears a dark green t-shirt and has a skeptical expression, while the man on the right wears a grey t-shirt and a necklace, smiling. Above them, a neon sign reads "OUR STUPID REACTIONS". A smaller screen is overlaid in the center of the scene. Initially, this overlay shows a dark blue background with the text "Only On" above a Disney logo. As the sequence progresses, the image on the overlay changes to include additional text, displaying "Only On" above the "Disney+ hotstar" logo. The men remain in their positions throughout the clip, though the man on the right continues to smile as he looks toward the screen.
